title: Domain pack scoring.yaml loader proof (NM-5 preview)
problem: Ticket-112 proved arbitrary manual_text live extraction fall-through. The creativity domain pack still loads only ontology.yaml and aliases.yaml; scoring.yaml and other pack files are declarative-only. NM-5 requires proving the domain-pack abstraction beyond labels before claiming domain-generality.
acceptance_criteria: scoring.yaml is loaded for creativity domain pack at runtime.
Score reconciliation behavior demonstrably uses pack-defined boost/threshold values.
Core engine does not hardcode creativity-specific scoring constants removed from pack.
Golden and manual synthnote tests remain green in mock mode.
non_goals: No cloud providers or live Ollama changes.
No loading all ten domain pack files in one ticket.
No public export or site changes.
rollback_plan: Revert scoring.yaml loader wiring; restore inline constants.
